name: Tianzhou-10
location_str: Pad 201 @ Wenchang Space Launch Site, CHN
description: Ninth cargo delivery mission to the Chinese space station.
program_description: The Tiangong space station is a space station placed in Low Earth orbit between 340 and 450 km above the surface.
rocket_fact: Ion thrusters used on satellites produce about as much force as the weight of a single sheet of paper.
